intro: Stenostomum lineolatum, also known as Linea or Stenostomum, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Acanthaceae. The health benefits of Stenostomum lineolatum include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The plant's bioactive constituents include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Stenostomum lineolatum is commonly used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used to treat colds, flu, and other respiratory infections.
